textByHashes.340cc8997b1dac8d5dbe98436250965f206ca780: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?
textByHashes.e2d61a45774331b987e1966d6c9f24c8fb21c116: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.
textByHashes.f88c86ae9bd3dcacfdcb30cfa05393c1403fc17e: Yer standin' in me light stranger. Can I sell ye somethin' that'll make ye move?
textByHashes.a84ef0f63470f5208763f27d8fd81589f136bdf7: Cutlasses! Think yer a pirate now lad?
textByHashes.dfb129386e776e3717438d95d0a1d98b887a5303: Cutlasses! Think yer a pirate now lass?
textByHashes.524112e824a53d4bcd04cf8233d2a06afe9b30d8: Cutlasses! Think yer a pirate now kid?
textByHashes.7ee67188e4e188ad9d70aa5be9bb5a7579b8e2e2: I have Brass Hand Harry's Cutlass. Well, a load of them to be honest.
textByHashes.d4e51f86b99d4c3341784ba41820c4b445052ef0: Then there's Unlucky Jenkins' Lucky Cutlass. Lovely blade that.
textByHashes.49fc64d703f5bc6f171527c02de480de25ebf21f: I've also got Gentleman Mallard's Rapier. Not a cutlass I know, but the finest blade ever wielded by a privateer.
textByHashes.848b08b7a50baa9c3164f7c976722f2eb42ae0ef: Now, which would ye like to hear about?
textByHashes.b0dcc6741ca411af4ca1029230d4a707ef2b0db5: Ye may end up meeting Brass Hand Harry if ye hang around long enough.
textByHashes.29feb9e17eadd867d6cc30f928acdf754e7a48d5: He lost his left arm to a canister round, but that didn't stop him much.
textByHashes.38ab6f169ba72aded6f87f5c76060f61a5976177: Then he lost his right hand at the wrist fightin' the excise men off the coast of Karamja.
textByHashes.2cb3ceb13ba5570f4d3598c28f7ab7e3255592a5: Not bein' the sort to lie about mopin', he asked me to make him a cutlass with a brass gauntlet fixed to the handle, and rig it up with a load of straps so he could keep fightin'.
textByHashes.25f13f8ac6f399ea52390c2caa292fd9fbb2fa7f: He's a great man is Harry, but he keeps snappin' the straps while he's at sea, so he sells the cutlasses back to me in exchange for a new one.
textByHashes.4dc3dd6c596a1d81bb658c7f9807f41f33f710df: It's quite a good blade, but the big, brass gauntlet is what makes it worthwhile. It's big enough to fit over even a real gauntlet, so ye get extra protection to yer sword hand.
textByHashes.b91a87ad8c943e277f76efbb1c1e875b31133535: I can sell ye one fer 1040 coins.
textByHashes.89e498f4efde381b1b088a7f6e49e27d47ce862b: Smart lad! Come and see me when ye have the coins fer it.
textByHashes.4ec79d5a07221374cd12a17e77cf6e15844f18c0: Smart lass! Come and see me when ye have the coins fer it.
textByHashes.7c54fdd90ff4165a5386c09eda55aa2c494763a2: Smart kid! Come and see me when ye have the coins fer it.
textByHashes.f6238537bf3f627845faa851110dfd5707bd6bc4: Here ye go. I've got a load of these left over if ye need more.
textByHashes.48fef1ad0fcd51d6ef36d23e44d4ae5e3b0e32ca: Well I'll still be here if ye change yer mind.
textByHashes.13fab1484d2257d334e626fbdb95b89f2ecf805d: Arr, tis a sad tale to this sword.
textByHashes.d0e513daf4e3be1d5470e93ad3c526d321d4bd6b: Jenkins was the lookout on the Jonah, a cursed vessel if there ever was one.
textByHashes.e10a72a27c112b936b27ebe6c88904bdb9eb2ed6: One day his ship were attacked by another group of pirates durin' a fierce storm. One of their bowmen took a shot at the Cap'n of the vessel, but it were deflected off his compass and hit Jenkins in the back.
textByHashes.829049d19e8e930e17ef8b78dc5444783c7d7913: That weren't the worst of it lad. He survived the fight, and the ship's surgeon was trying to get the arrow out when...
textByHashes.df90235cbdd8d172d57844e21156dcd01b3cd60d: That weren't the worst of it lass. He survived the fight, and the ship's surgeon was trying to get the arrow out when...
textByHashes.2f10ec658891d72f3304a10209d07619f9e9a72d: That weren't the worst of it kid. He survived the fight, and the ship's surgeon was trying to get the arrow out when...
textByHashes.898291697491a18406f6a2f8f0b73882b88d3ef9: Are ye familiar with the spell bones to bananas?
textByHashes.39684d59ffce537265eeb9a59f9709caa5053009: Well, due to a blow to the head he took in the fight, the surgeon cast that spell, thinking it was some sort of new healing spell.
textByHashes.c406eabe8c1bd1df840e0e0a1fbf412807495c89: And he did so while touching Jenkins' ribs.
textByHashes.3e2926c2e8262cc3979c26d547d0c680d51ce539: See, he survived, his bones turned to bananas, as a huge storm blew up and the crew debated what to do with him.
textByHashes.401d00bfe823c243e5e790b22e990e2fe6afab10: But you see, the storm was actually the tail end of a hurricane that had swept the nearby jungle islands, and when it approached the ship it petered out, droppin' all manner of strange things onto the deck and into the
textByHashes.823f6a12bb6c1b0a2d5fcb565ac1c42209027963: The worst part was when the ship was bombarded with ravenous, hunger-crazed monkeys, the majority of which landed on Jenkins as he lay recoverin'.
textByHashes.4b5c337acb347c25320f654eaa6d1647decb1753: See, what happened next, after the monkeys had had their way with him was...
textByHashes.9ef36c4afc0cddfc47f4210508534f6b023c5b26: Well, after the poor man passed on...
textByHashes.7fc1ea11faebdb28b17890a17474df0f9fbb7394: In a final, terrifying, mashed potato coated tragedy...
textByHashes.93bec73b7c44156305508ec8d4cda11dee9e719f: His shipmates found his cutlass was completely untouched.
textByHashes.243328de93b7d894e53dbd9ed9f59c35215f4341: See, having been exposed to all the bad luck that Jenkins went through, the thing is unlikely to ever see anything that bad again.
textByHashes.ae5ea21ccbb2c494de321f62c9ed00ae088880a1: Ye can have it fer 2560 coins.
textByHashes.530d06309fa056d87be686179f862c029b23d562: Here ye go. I hope it brings you luck.
textByHashes.bbf0524326167b6da29c1c5a5513d0ebd2e1ebdc: Well, I'll tell ye the story, but it'll take a great deal of convincin' for me to sell you this rapier.
textByHashes.0e9ff7f21a2a30e803525fa057f20a422b8f2dd6: See, gentleman Mallard is a legend in these parts. His family had been rich, shipping all sorts of goods up and down the coast.
textByHashes.d3b794d56baabd57b8e4aa58541b39822000c836: Then their rivals got together and had their ships sunk, one after the other, and his business partners were all either bought off or had...accidents.
textByHashes.d5cd8ec6b79b82e5119773ad26d71470b29aa23d: With no money and only one ship left, he took to the life of a pirate, but no brigand was he.
textByHashes.95d558cfd8d9a923cf276010767d74cd8665aef8: He took only from those men that had brought about his downfall, was fair with his men, and generous with his loot.
textByHashes.d69ff3c7572960842ff9c0d07c1aca8524767bc0: Why, this island would have been wiped out by the shakes if he hadn't turned over his stash to buy medicine.
textByHashes.259eb3caeebeca10ce998b858798f19499c17713: One day his ship was attacked by a huge sea creature that swept the decks of men with its tentacles.
textByHashes.8ca2d24072798ea4f09f3abe27869c473508ac5b: The crew took to the lifeboats, and the last they saw of him the gentleman was stabbin' at the thing as it hauled the ship under the water.
textByHashes.2e3de9af6439d1490e73e7a61f162ca22c70bf87: A week later about ten foot of tentacle washed up on the beach, with his rapier embedded in it to the hilt.
textByHashes.53a1c8f0fcadd3fd315604f93ef0391bbd80af94: I took it, cleaned it up, and I've been lookin' after it ever since.
textByHashes.c166c77c3653df58fa0edd799b6b8d25a86d5715: I can't let it go for less than 25600 coins, and even then that's a bargain.
textByHashes.2ef0fffda1e3bb8ebc400f53ae0f64881f41d929: Ye think ye have what it takes to wield it?
textByHashes.509481362f640e2df294bbdcdc6ba1c733353b0e: I hope yer worthy enough to wield this, stranger. I'd hate te think Gentleman Mallard would be disappointed in me fer sellin' it to ye.
textByHashes.391ff8aeb10967e8eaf9679a5236535662ee7dad: Well, this is a very unusual job. This thing looks more suited to bashin' peoples heads in than securing a ship.
textByHashes.e4dbe72a06013366bf8b0e24cbabf7ab17144fc6: Stole it eh? Well I can sort it out for 230000 coins, if you like.
textByHashes.392499b24a81c066db9a97387a3cd67a04ca189f: There ye go, good as new!
